data.title: Defense Startup Shield AI Reaches $5.3 Billion Valuation: Details
data.description: Shield AI has secured $240 million in funding, boosting its valuation to $5.3 billion. The investment, backed by major players like L3Harris Technologies and Hanwha Aerospace, will advance the development of Hivemind Enterprise, an autonomy software suite designed to accelerate the creation of intelligent machines, including unmanned systems capable of operating in GPS-denied environments.

data.description: U.S. stock futures rose on Friday following Thursday's selloff that pushed the Nasdaq 100 index into the correction zone.

data.title: Phoenix Motor Forecasts Tenfold Revenue Growth In 2024, Stock Jumps
data.description: Phoenix Motor shares jump premarket after disclosing 2024 and 2025 revenue guidance. Projects significant growth and profitability.
